name: claude-sessions-dashboard
description: Floating always-on-top status bar that visualizes active Claude Code sessions with color-coded indicator lights (green idle / yellow working / red permission). Process-based session detection + hook-driven status updates.

hooks.command: python -c "import re,sys,urllib.request; t=sys.stdin.read(); m=re.search(r'\"session_id\"\s*:\s*\"([^\"]+)\"',t); sid=m.group(1) if m else ''; urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(f'http://127.0.0.1:18721/hook/UserPromptSubmit?sid={sid}',method='POST'))"

python -c "import re,sys,urllib.request; t=sys.stdin.read(); m=re.search(r'\"session_id\"\s*:\s*\"([^\"]+)\"',t); sid=m.group(1) if m else ''; urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(f'http://127.0.0.1:18721/hook/Stop?sid={sid}',method='POST'))"

python -c "import re,sys,urllib.request; t=sys.stdin.read(); m=re.search(r'\"session_id\"\s*:\s*\"([^\"]+)\"',t); sid=m.group(1) if m else ''; urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(f'http://127.0.0.1:18721/hook/StopFailure?sid={sid}',method='POST'))"

python -c "import re,sys,urllib.request; t=sys.stdin.read(); m=re.search(r'\"session_id\"\s*:\s*\"([^\"]+)\"',t); sid=m.group(1) if m else ''; urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(f'http://127.0.0.1:18721/hook/PermissionRequest?sid={sid}',method='POST'))"

python -c "import re,sys,urllib.request; t=sys.stdin.read(); m=re.search(r'\"session_id\"\s*:\s*\"([^\"]+)\"',t); sid=m.group(1) if m else ''; urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(f'http://127.0.0.1:18721/hook/PostToolUse?sid={sid}',method='POST'))"

python -c "import re,sys,urllib.request; t=sys.stdin.read(); m=re.search(r'\"session_id\"\s*:\s*\"([^\"]+)\"',t); sid=m.group(1) if m else ''; urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(f'http://127.0.0.1:18721/hook/PostToolUseFailure?sid={sid}',method='POST'))"

python -c "import re,sys,urllib.request; t=sys.stdin.read(); m=re.search(r'\"session_id\"\s*:\s*\"([^\"]+)\"',t); sid=m.group(1) if m else ''; urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(f'http://127.0.0.1:18721/hook/PermissionDenied?sid={sid}',method='POST'))"
